info.name: enrgy_BE API
info.description:
API collection for enrgy-BE (TAQA Gas/Energy maintenance platform).

**Setup:**
1. Set `baseUrl` (e.g. `http://localhost:4000`).
2. Run **Auth > Login** with email/password; the access token is saved automatically.
3. All other requests use `Authorization: Bearer {{accessToken}}`.

**Standard error cases (apply to most routes):**
- **400** Bad Request: Business rule violation, invalid state, duplicate resource.
- **401** Unauthorized: Missing or invalid token; account inactive.
- **403** Forbidden: Insufficient permissions or wrong org type (e.g. Authority-only, Fuel Station-only).
- **404** Not Found: Resource by ID not found or not accessible.
- **422** Unprocessable Entity: Validation errors (Zod) — invalid body or query.
- **500** Internal Server Error: Unexpected server error.

request.description:
## Summary
Register a new organization (SERVICE_PROVIDER or FUEL_STATION) with the first user. Organization starts as PENDING until Authority approves.

## Auth
No auth required.

## Request
- **Method:** POST
- **Body:** organizationName, organizationType (SERVICE_PROVIDER | FUEL_STATION), email, password, fullName, phone (optional)

## Success
- **201:** `{ success: true, data: { user, organization, accessToken, refreshToken, expiresIn }, message }`

## Error cases
- **400** Bad Request: Email already registered.
- **422** Unprocessable Entity: Validation errors (Zod) — invalid or missing body fields.
- **500** Internal Server Error: Server error.

## Summary
Login with email and password. Returns access and refresh tokens. Use the test script to save accessToken to the collection variable.

## Auth
No auth required.

## Request
- **Method:** POST
- **Body:** email, password

## Success
- **200:** `{ success: true, data: { user, organization, accessToken, refreshToken, expiresIn } }`

## Error cases
- **401** Unauthorized: Invalid email or password; or account is inactive.
- **422** Unprocessable Entity: Validation errors (Zod) — invalid body.
- **500** Internal Server Error: Server error.

## Summary
Exchange a valid refresh token for a new access token and refresh token.

## Auth
No auth required.

## Request
- **Method:** POST
- **Body:** refreshToken

## Success
- **200:** `{ success: true, data: { accessToken, refreshToken, expiresIn } }`

## Error cases
- **401** Unauthorized: Invalid or expired refresh token; user not found.
- **422** Unprocessable Entity: Validation errors (Zod).
- **500** Internal Server Error: Server error.

## Summary
Get current authenticated user profile with organization, roles, and permissions (scope).

## Auth
Bearer token required.

## Request
- **Method:** GET
- **Headers:** Authorization: Bearer {{accessToken}}

## Success
- **200:** `{ user, organization, roles, permissions, scope }`

## Error cases
- **401** Unauthorized: Missing or invalid token; user or organization not found.
- **500** Internal Server Error: Server error.

## Summary
Simple health check endpoint. No authentication required.

## Auth
No auth required.

## Request
- **Method:** GET
- **URL:** /api/health (note: app may mount at /api; if 404 try baseUrl/health)

## Success
- **200:** `{ success: true, message: 'OK' }`

## Error cases
- **404** Not Found: If health is mounted at a different path.
- **500** Internal Server Error: Server error.

## Summary
Get the current user's organization.

## Auth
Bearer token required.

## Success
- **200:** Organization object.

## Error cases
- **401** Unauthorized. **403** Forbidden. **404** Not Found. **500** Server error.

## Summary
Update the current user's organization (e.g. name).

## Auth
Bearer token required.

## Request
- **Body:** name (optional), other allowed fields.

## Success
- **200:** Updated organization.

## Error cases
- **400/422** Validation. **401** Unauthorized. **403** Forbidden. **404** Not Found. **500** Server error.

## Summary
List all organizations. Authority only; requires organizations.read.

## Auth
Bearer token required (Authority).

## Request
- **Query:** type (AUTHORITY | SERVICE_PROVIDER | FUEL_STATION), status (PENDING | APPROVED | REJECTED), page, limit

## Success
- **200:** Paginated list of organizations.

## Error cases
- **401** Unauthorized. **403** Forbidden (not Authority or missing permission). **422** Validation. **500** Server error.

## Summary
List fuel stations only. Authority only; requires organizations.read.

## Auth
Bearer token required (Authority).

## Request
- **Query:** status (optional), page, limit. Response: { items, total, page, limit }.

## Success
- **200:** `{ items, total, page, limit }`.

## Error cases
- **401** Unauthorized. **403** Forbidden. **422** Validation. **500** Server error.

## Summary
Get organization by ID. Caller must be in same org or Authority.

## Auth
Bearer token required.

## Success
- **200:** Organization object.

## Error cases
- **401** Unauthorized. **403** Forbidden. **404** Not Found. **500** Server error.

## Summary
Approve a PENDING organization. Authority only; requires organizations.approve.

## Auth
Bearer token required (Authority).

## Request
- **Body:** decision: "APPROVED". Replace :id with organization id.

## Success
- **200:** Updated organization (status APPROVED).

## Error cases
- **400** Bad Request: Organization not PENDING or invalid state. **401** Unauthorized. **403** Forbidden. **404** Not Found. **422** Validation. **500** Server error.

## Summary
Reject a PENDING organization. Authority only; reason is required.

## Auth
Bearer token required (Authority).

## Request
- **Body:** decision: "REJECTED", reason: string (required). Replace :id with organization id.

## Success
- **200:** Updated organization (status REJECTED).

## Error cases
- **400** Bad Request: Organization not PENDING; missing reason. **401** Unauthorized. **403** Forbidden. **404** Not Found. **422** Validation. **500** Server error.

## Summary
List documents for an organization. Owner or Authority.

## Auth
Bearer token required.

## Success
- **200:** List of documents.

## Error cases
- **401** Unauthorized. **403** Forbidden. **404** Not Found. **500** Server error.

## Summary
Get approval/rejection history for an organization.

## Auth
Bearer token required.

## Success
- **200:** Approval history records.

## Error cases
- **401** Unauthorized. **403** Forbidden. **404** Not Found. **500** Server error.

## Summary
List users in the current organization (or by organizationId for Authority). Requires users.read.

## Auth
Bearer token required.

## Request
- **Query:** organizationId (optional, Authority only), page, limit

## Success
- **200:** List of users; each includes roles: [{ id, name }].

## Error cases
- **401** Unauthorized. **403** Forbidden (missing users.read). **422** Validation. **500** Server error.

## Summary
Get user by ID. Caller must be in same organization or Authority. Requires users.read.

## Auth
Bearer token required.

## Success
- **200:** User object with roles: [{ id, name }].

## Error cases
- **401** Unauthorized. **403** Forbidden. **404** Not Found. **500** Server error.

## Summary
Create a new user in the current organization. Requires approved org and users.create.

## Auth
Bearer token required.

## Request
- **Body:** email, password, fullName, phone (optional)

## Success
- **201:** Created user (password excluded).

## Error cases
- **400** Bad Request: Email already in use; org not approved. **401** Unauthorized. **403** Forbidden. **422** Validation. **500** Server error.

## Summary
List branches of the current organization. Requires approved org and branches.read.

## Auth
Bearer token required.

## Success
- **200:** List of branches.

## Error cases
- **401** Unauthorized. **403** Forbidden. **500** Server error.

## Summary
Get branch by ID (same org).

## Success
- **200:** Branch object. **404** Not Found. **401/403/500**.

## Summary
Create a branch. Requires branches.create.

## Request
- **Body:** nameEn, nameAr, address, areaId.

## Success
- **201:** Created branch. **400/422** Validation. **401/403/500**.

## Summary
Update branch. Requires branches.update.

## Success
- **200:** Updated branch. **404** Not Found. **401/403/422/500**.

## Summary
Delete branch. Requires branches.update.

## Success
- **200/204:** Deleted. **404** Not Found. **400** If branch in use. **401/403/500**.

## Summary
Submit a branch request for Authority approval. Requires branch_requests.create and approved org.

## Success
- **201:** Created request. **401/403/422/500**.

## Summary
List branch requests (own org or Authority). Query: status, page, limit. **401/403/422/500**.

## Summary
Get branch request by ID. **200** Request. **404** Not Found. **401/403/500**.

## Summary
Approve a branch request. Authority only; branch_requests.approve. **200** Approved. **400** Invalid state. **401/403/404/500**.

## Summary
Reject a branch request. Authority only; body: reason. **200** Rejected. **400/422** Missing reason. **401/403/404/500**.

## Summary
Get full location hierarchy (countries → governorates → cities → areas). Public, no auth.

## Success
- **200:** Tree. **500** Server error.

## Summary
List countries. Public.

## Success
- **200:** List of countries. **500**.

## Summary
Get governorates by countryId. Query params as per schema. **200** List. **404/422/500**.

## Summary
Get cities by governorateId. **200** List. **404/422/500**.

## Summary
Get areas by cityId. **200** List. **404/422/500**.

## Summary
List service requests (legacy). For new flow use GET /api/station/requests. Requires requests.read.

## Success
- **200:** List. **401/403/500**.

## Summary
Create legacy service request. Prefer POST /api/station/maintenance-requests. Requires requests.create.

## Success
- **201:** Created. **400/422**. **401/403/500**.

## Summary
Get service request by ID. **200** Request. **404** Not Found. **401/403/500**.

## Summary
Cancel a service request. Requires requests.update. **200** Cancelled. **400** Invalid state. **401/403/404/500**.

## Summary
List quotations for the org. Requires quotations.read and approved org.

## Success
- **200:** List. **401/403/500**.

## Summary
Get quotation by ID. **200** Quotation. **404** Not Found. **401/403/500**.

## Summary
Submit a quotation. Requires valid provider documents and quotations.submit. **201** Created. **400** Invalid request/state. **401/403/422/500**.

## Summary
Withdraw a quotation. **200** Withdrawn. **400** Invalid state. **401/403/404/500**.

## Summary
Approve a quotation (station). Requires proposals.approve. **200** Approved. **400** Invalid state. **401/403/404/500**.

## Summary
Reject a quotation. Body: reason. **200** Rejected. **400/422** Missing reason. **401/403/404/500**.

## Summary
List job orders. Query: status, paymentStatus, page, limit. Requires job_orders.read.

## Success
- **200:** List (or paginated data with items). **401/403/422/500**.

## Summary
Get job orders awaiting payment confirmation (SP). JobOrder.status=AWAITING_PAYMENT and PaymentConfirmation.status=FS_CONFIRMED. Requires payments.confirm_received, job_orders.read.

## Success
- **200:** Review queue. **401/403/422/500**.

## Summary
Get job order by ID (includes ServiceRequest, PaymentConfirmation, User details). Requires job_orders.read.

## Success
- **200:** Job order. **404** Not Found. **401/403/500**.

## Summary
Update job order status. Body: status (IN_PROGRESS, WAITING_PARTS, UNDER_REVIEW, COMPLETED, CANCELLED). reason required if status=CANCELLED. Requires job_orders.update. **200** Updated. **400** Invalid status. **401/403/404/422/500**.

## Summary
Get payment confirmation for a job order. Requires payments.read, job_orders.read. **200** Payment. **404** **401/403/500**.

## Summary
Submit payment proof (receipt file and/or reference). At least referenceNumber or receipt file required. Requires payments.submit. **201** Created. **400/422** **401/403/404/500**.

## Summary
Fuel Station confirms payment sent. Body: confirm (boolean), note optional. If reject: rejectionReason required. Requires payments.confirm_sent. **200** **400/422** **401/403/404/500**.

## Summary
Service Provider confirms payment received. On confirm: JobOrder becomes ACTIVE. Body: confirm, note optional; if reject: rejectionReason required. Requires payments.confirm_received. **200** **400/422** **401/403/404/500**.

## Summary
List operator assignments for job order. Requires job_orders.read. **200** List. **404** **401/403/500**.

## Summary
Create operator assignment. Job order must be ACTIVE (payment confirmed). Body: operatorId (required), arrivalTime (ISO), status optional. Requires job_orders.update, requireJobOrderActive. **201** Created. **400/422** **401/403/404/500**.

## Summary
Update assignment. Body: arrivalTime (ISO), status optional. Replace last 1 with assignmentId. Requires job_orders.update. **200** **400/422** **401/403/404/500**.

## Summary
List visits for job order. Requires job_orders.read. **200** List. **404** **401/403/500**.

## Summary
Create visit. Job order must be ACTIVE. Body: visitDate (YYYY-MM-DD), status (required), notes optional. Requires job_orders.update. **201** Created. **400/422** **401/403/404/500**.

## Summary
Update visit. Body: visitDate, status, notes optional. Replace last 1 with visitId. Requires job_orders.update. **200** **400/422** **401/403/404/500**.

## Summary
Create internal task. Requires internal_tasks.assign. **201** Created. **400/422** **401/403/500**.

## Summary
List internal tasks. Query: status, branchId, page, limit. **200** List. **401/403/422/500**.

## Summary
Get tasks assigned to current user. **200** List. **401/403/422/500**.

## Summary
List users that can be assigned to tasks. **200** List. **401/403/500**.

## Summary
Get task statistics. Query: branchId. **200** Stats. **401/403/422/500**.

## Summary
Get tasks pending review. Requires internal_tasks.review. **200** List. **401/403/500**.

## Summary
Get internal task by ID. **200** Task. **404** **401/403/500**.

## Summary
Approve/reject task. Body: decision (APPROVE/REJECT), note optional. **200** Updated. **400/422** **401/403/404/500**.

## Summary
Update task status. **200** Updated. **400/422** **401/403/404/500**.

## Summary
Close internal task. Requires internal_tasks.close. **200** Closed. **400** Invalid state. **401/403/404/500**.

## Summary
Create internal work order (Fuel Station only). **201** Created. **403** Not FS. **401/422/500**.

## Summary
List internal work orders. Query: status, branchId, page, limit. **200** List. **403** Not FS. **401/422/500**.

## Summary
Get internal WOs pending review. **200** List. **403** **401/422/500**.

item.name: Get Internal Work Order by ID

request.description:
## Summary
Get internal work order by ID. **200** WO. **404** **403** **401/500**.

## Summary
Update internal WO. **200** Updated. **400/422/404** **403** **401/500**.

## Summary
Review (approve/reject) internal WO. **200** **400/422/404** **403** **401/500**.

## Summary
Close internal work order. **200** **400** Invalid state. **403/404** **401/500**.

## Summary
List work orders (v2, Fuel Station). Query: status, branchId, page, limit. **200** List. **403** Not FS. **401/422/500**.

## Summary
Get dashboard counters (tasks, work orders, job orders, requests, quotations). Requires one of internal_tasks.read, workorders.read, job_orders.read, requests.read, quotations.read.

## Success
- **200:** Counters. **401/403/500**.

## Summary
Get dashboard summary. Requires internal_tasks.read. **200** Summary. **401/403/500**.

## Summary
List warehouses. Requires warehouse.read. **200** List. **401/403/500**.

## Summary
Create warehouse. Requires warehouse.manage. **201** Created. **400/422** **401/403/500**.

## Summary
Get warehouse by ID. **200** Warehouse. **404** **401/403/500**.

## Summary
List items in warehouse. Query: page, limit. **200** List. **404** **401/403/422/500**.

## Summary
Create warehouse item. **201** Created. **400/422/404** **401/403/500**.

## Summary
Update warehouse item. **200** Updated. **404/422** **401/403/500**.

## Summary
Update item stock quantity. **200** Updated. **400/404/422** **401/403/500**.

## Summary
Delete warehouse item. **200/204** **404** **400** If in use. **401/403/500**.

## Summary
Create warehouse order (DRAFT). **201** Created. **400/422** **401/403/500**.

## Summary
List warehouse orders. Query: status, page, limit. **200** List. **401/403/422/500**.

## Summary
Get warehouse order by ID. **200** Order. **404** **401/403/500**.

## Summary
Update order items (DRAFT only). Body: array of item entries. **200** **400** Not DRAFT. **401/403/404/422/500**.

## Summary
Submit order (DRAFT → SUBMITTED). **200** **400** Invalid state. **401/403/404/500**.

## Summary
Mark as under review (SUBMITTED → UNDER_REVIEW). **200** **400** **401/403/404/500**.

## Summary
Approve order (UNDER_REVIEW → APPROVED). **200** **400** **401/403/404/500**.

## Summary
Issue order (APPROVED → ISSUED). **200** **400** **401/403/404/500**.

## Summary
Deliver (ISSUED → DELIVERED). **200** **400** **401/403/404/500**.

## Summary
Close (DELIVERED → CLOSED). **200** **400** **401/403/404/500**.

## Summary
Cancel order (non-terminal → CANCELLED). **200** **400** **401/403/404/500**.

## Summary
Create maintenance request (INTERNAL or EXTERNAL). Body: title, branchId, maintenanceMode (INTERNAL/EXTERNAL), description, assetId, etc. **201** Created. **400/422** **401/403/500**.

## Summary
List station requests (external + legacy). Query: source, status, page, limit. **200** List. **401/403/422/500**.

## Summary
Get station request by ID. Query: source (optional). **200** Request. **404** **401/403/500**.

## Summary
Send RFQ to providers. Body: providerOrganizationIds and/or governorateId, serviceCategoryId. **200** Sent. **400** Invalid request state. **401/403/404/422/500**.

## Summary
Select quote for request (creates job order). **200** **400** Invalid state/quote. **401/403/404/422/500**.

## Summary
Reject a quote. Body: quoteId, reason. **200** **400/422** **401/403/404/500**.

## Summary
List linked service providers. **200** List. **401/403/500**.

## Summary
List available providers to link. Query: search. **200** List. **401/403/422/500**.

## Summary
Get linked provider profile by ID. **200** Profile. **404** **401/403/500**.

## Summary
Link a provider. Body: providerOrganizationId. **201** **400** Already linked. **401/403/404/422/500**.

## Summary
Remove linked provider. **200/204** **404** **401/403/500**.

## Summary
List RFQs for provider. Query: status, page, limit. **200** List. **401/403/422/500**.

## Summary
Create quote for RFQ. Requires valid provider documents. **201** Created. **400** Invalid RFQ state. **401/403/404/422/500**.

## Summary
Withdraw quote. **200** **400** Invalid state. **401/403/404/500**.

## Summary
List provider job orders. Query: status, page, limit. **200** List. **401/403/422/500**.

## Summary
Get provider job order by ID. **200** Job order. **404** **401/403/500**.

## Summary
Assign operator to job order. Requires valid docs. **200/201** **400** Invalid state. **401/403/404/422/500**.

## Summary
Accept team invitation by token. No auth. **200** Accepted. **400** Invalid/expired token. **422** **500**.

## Summary
Invite user to team. Body: email, fullName, roleId. **201** Invitation sent. **400** Email already exists. **401/403/422/500**.

## Summary
List pending invitations. **200** List. **401/403/500**.

## Summary
List team users. **200** List. **401/403/500**.

## Summary
Get job grades (for roles). **200** List. **401/403/500**.

## Summary
Deactivate team user. **200** **400/404** **401/403/500**.

## Summary
Cancel pending invitation. **200** **400/404** **401/403/500**.

## Summary
List roles (org-scoped or Authority). **200** List. **401/403/500**.

## Summary
List permissions available for org type. **200** List. **401/403/500**.

## Summary
Get role by ID with permissions. **200** Role. **404** **401/403/500**.

## Summary
Create role. Requires approved org and roles.create. Body: name, organizationType, permissionIds. **201** Created. **400/422** **401/403/500**.

## Summary
List audit logs. Authority only; requires audit.read. Query: entityType, entityId, action, userId, from, to, page, limit.

## Success
- **200:** Paginated audit entries. **401** **403** **422** **500**.

## Summary
List service categories. **200** List. **401/403/500**.

## Summary
Get service category by ID. **200** Category. **404** **401/403/500**.

## Summary
List inspections. Authority only; inspections.read. **200** List. **401/403/500**.

## Summary
Get inspection by ID. **200** Inspection. **404** **401/403/500**.

## Summary
Create inspection. Authority; inspections.create. **201** Created. **400/422** **401/403/500**.

## Summary
List operators (service provider). **200** List. **401/403/500**.

## Summary
Get operator by ID. **200** Operator. **404** **401/403/500**.
